mapper.select: /** CmmtSurveyMemberAnsDao.selectCmmvUserList_answerer */ select member_id ,member_nm ,authority_id ,member_st ,member_type ,enc_email ,enc_mobile_no from cmmv_user where member_id in ( select member_id from cmmt_survey_member_ans where survey_id = #{surveyId} and created_dt between to_timestamp(#{beginDay} || '000000', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') and to_timestamp(#{endDay} || '235959', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') )

/** CmmtSurveyMemberAnsDao.existsMember_day */ select exists ( select member_ans_id from cmmt_survey_member_ans where survey_id = #{surveyId} and member_id = #{memberId} and created_dt between to_timestamp(#{day} || '000000', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') and to_timestamp(#{day} || '235959', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') )

/** CmmtSurveyMemberAnsDao.selectResultAnswerList */ select a.survey_id ,a.question_id ,a.answer_id ,a.answer_no ,u.short_answer ,sum( case when u.member_id is null then 0 else 1 end ) as cnt from cmmt_survey_answer a left join ( select * from cmmt_survey_member_ans where created_dt between to_timestamp(#{beginDay},'YYYYMMDD') and to_timestamp( #{endDay} || '235959', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ) U on ( a.survey_id = u.survey_id and a.question_id = u.question_id and a.answer_id = u.answer_id ) where a.survey_id = #{surveyId} group by a.survey_id, a.question_id, a.answer_id, a.answer_no, u.short_answer
